ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Date notes are already configured. This may overwrite your current settings.
ast.target: 日期笔记已配置。这可能会覆盖您当前的设置。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 批量添加传递规则错误 >

ast.name: error
ast.target: 生成 mermaid 图表时出错

ast.name: info
ast.target: redraw_page_views > 未找到 markdown 视图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link daily notes sequentially and to their parent period notes
ast.target: 按顺序链接每日笔记并链接到其父周期笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use next_week/prev_week, next_month/prev_month, etc. instead of generic next/prev. Fields are created automatically.
ast.target: 使用 next_week/prev_week、next_month/prev_month 等，而不是通用的 next/prev。字段会自动创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Monday uses ISO week numbering. Sunday shifts Sundays into the following week so they match US-style week files.
ast.target: 星期一使用 ISO 周编号。星期日将星期日移至下一周，以匹配美国风格的周文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable date notes with period hierarchy and transitive rules
ast.target: 启用具有周期层次结构和传递规则的日期笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Monday uses ISO week numbering. Sunday shifts Sundays into the following week to match US-style week files.
ast.target: 星期一使用 ISO 周编号。星期日将星期日移至下一周，以匹配美国风格的周文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the previous/next view at the top of the page
ast.target: 在页面顶部显示上一个/下一个视图

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用上一个/下一个视图

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在文件夹中冻结隐含边

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 别名（如有，取第一个别名）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: KaTeX doesn't work in quirks mode. Make sure your website has a suitable doctype.
ast.target: 警告：KaTeX 在怪异模式下无法工作。请确保您的网站具有合适的文档类型声明。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` failed because your server does not serve Wasm with `application/wasm` MIME type. Falling back to `WebAssembly.instantiate` which is slower. Original error:
ast.target: `WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming` 失败，因为您的服务器未以 `application/wasm` MIME 类型提供 Wasm。回退到速度较慢的 `WebAssembly.instantiate`。原始错误：\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source: using deprecated parameters for the initialization function; pass a single object instead
ast.target: 正在使用已弃用的初始化函数参数；请改为传递单个对象

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target: %c[svelte] derived_inert\n%c读取一个属于已销毁效果的派生值可能会导致过时的值\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value
%cThe `value` property of a `<select multiple>` element should be an array, but it received a non-array value. The selection will be kept as is.
https://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value
ast.target: %c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value\n%c`<select multiple>` 元素的 `value` 属性应为数组，但收到了一个非数组值。选择将保持原样。\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是一个组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 激活视图 > 未找到叶子节点

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Copied to clipboard and logged to console.
ast.target: 已复制到剪贴板并记录到控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Some rules could not be parsed. Ensure you're using the correct syntax of `[field-one, field-two] -> close-field`, with each rule of a new line.
ast.target: 部分规则无法解析。请确保您使用的是正确的语法 `[field-one, field-two] -> close-field`，每条规则占一行。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Some rules could not be parsed. Check the logs for more information.
ast.target: 部分规则无法解析。请查看日志获取更多信息。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please restart Obsidian for the changes to take effect
ast.target: 请重启 Obsidian 以使更改生效

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Depth must be a non-negative number

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Breadcrumbs: failed to render settings tab. See developer console and report at https://github.com/michaelpporter/breadcrumbs/issues
ast.target: 面包屑：渲染设置选项卡失败。请查看开发者控制台并在 https://github.com/michaelpporter/breadcrumbs/issues 报告问题

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Freezing implied edges in the selected folder.
ast.target: 正在冻结所选文件夹中的隐含边。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Finished freezing implied edges in folder.
ast.target: 已完成冻结文件夹中的隐含边。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 列表索引已复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有活动的 Markdown 视图

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Graph stats printed to console and copied to clipboard
ast.target: 图统计信息已打印到控制台并复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Freezing implied edges to all notes in vault...
ast.target: 正在将隐含边冻结到保险库中的所有笔记...

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Look for date notes to use as edge sources
ast.target: 查找用作边源的日期备注

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field used to join date notes together. Breadcrumbs takes the current note's date, adds one day, and joins the two notes with this field.
ast.target: 用于将日期备注连接在一起的字段。面包屑获取当前笔记的日期，加上一天，并使用此字段连接两个笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If there is a gap from one day to another, should the next note be the unresolved one in one day or should it 'stretch' to the next resolved (existing) note?
ast.target: 如果从一天到另一天存在间隔，下一个笔记应该是某一天内未解析的那个，还是应该“延伸”到下一个已解析（已存在）的笔记？

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Set the level of debug logging
ast.target: 设置调试日志记录的级别

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Look for dendron notes to use as edge sources
ast.target: 查找用作边源的 Dendron 笔记

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Character that splits the note basename into a Dendron-style hierarchy (for example - in git-pull vs . in git.pull). It must match what you actually use in filenames; the wrong delimiter means no Dendron edges are built.
ast.target: 将笔记基名拆分为 Dendron 风格层次结构的字符（例如 git-pull 中的 - 或 git.pull 中的 .）。它必须与您在文件名中实际使用的字符匹配；错误的分隔符意味着不会构建 Dendron 边。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field to use if the BC-dendron-note-field is not specified
ast.target: 如果未指定 BC-dendron-note-field，则使用的字段

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field to use for sibling edges between notes at the same level in the hierarchy. Leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 用于在层次结构中同级笔记之间创建兄弟边的字段。留空则禁用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display Dendron note names as the right-most split of the delimiter. e.g. `a.b.c` -> `c`
ast.target: 将 Dendron 笔记名称显示为分隔符最右侧的拆分部分。例如 `a.b.c` -> `c`

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whether to enable the edge field suggestor
ast.target: 是否启用边字段建议器

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The string that triggers the suggestor (when entered at the start of a line)
ast.target: 触发建议器的字符串（在行首输入时）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Where to write the frozen edges to

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Freeze implied edges using the first alias of the target node.
ast.target: 使用目标节点的第一个别名冻结隐含边。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show the trail view at the top of the page
ast.target: 在页面顶部显示轨迹视图

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How to select the path(s) to display in the trail view
ast.target: 如何选择要在轨迹视图中显示的路径

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default depth of the trail view

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Merge fields in the traversal, instead of keeping their paths separate
ast.target: 在遍历中合并字段，而不是保持其路径分离

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show controls to change the depth/format/path-selection of the trail view
ast.target: 显示控件以更改轨迹视图的深度/格式/路径选择

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Message to display when there is no path to display. Leave blank to hide the trail view when there is no path.
ast.target: 当没有路径可显示时显示的消息。留空则在没有路径时隐藏轨迹视图。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Look for Johnny.Decimal notes to use as edge sources
ast.target: 查找用作边源的 Johnny.Decimal 笔记

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Delimiter to use to split the note name
ast.target: 用于拆分笔记名称的分隔符

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field to use to point to next note in the Johnny.Decimal system
ast.target: 用于指向 Johnny.Decimal 系统中下一个笔记的字段

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Indentation to use for each level

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field to use to join neighbouring list items.
ast.target: 用于连接相邻列表项的字段。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Sort matrix edge fields by a custom label order.
ast.target: 按自定义标签顺序对矩阵边字段进行排序。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Lock the matrix view to the current file
ast.target: 将矩阵视图锁定到当前文件

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Path to lock the matrix view to (overrides current file)
ast.target: 锁定矩阵视图的路径（覆盖当前文件）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Keep the page views pinned to the top of the note as you scroll
ast.target: 在滚动时将页面视图固定在笔记顶部

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Show a notification when the graph is rebuilt
ast.target: 在图表重建时显示通知

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field to use if the BC-regex-note-field is not specified
ast.target: 当未指定 BC-regex-note-field 时使用的字段

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field to use if the BC-tag-note-field is not specified
ast.target: 当未指定 BC-tag-note-field 时使用的字段

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field to use for sibling edges between notes sharing the same tag. Leave empty to disable. Can be overridden per note with BC-tag-note-sibling-field.
ast.target: 用于在共享相同标签的笔记之间创建兄弟边的字段。留空以禁用。可通过 BC-tag-note-sibling-field 按笔记覆盖。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Where to write the new edge to

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The template to use for the target path. You don't need to add the .md extension.
ast.target: 用于目标路径的模板。无需添加 .md 扩展名。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Field to use when BC-traverse-note-field is not specified in the note
ast.target: 当笔记中未指定 BC-traverse-note-field 时使用的字段

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Walk up the hierarchy to find the root note, then display the tree from there. When off, the tree starts from the current file.
ast.target: 沿层级向上查找根笔记，然后从该处显示树视图。关闭时，树视图从当前文件开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default depth of the tree view

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Lock the tree view to the current file
ast.target: 将树视图锁定到当前文件

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Path to lock the tree view to (overrides current file)
ast.target: 将树视图锁定到的路径（覆盖当前文件）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这会将数学公式设置为显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面的独立行上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a minimum thickness, in ems, for fraction lines, `\sqrt` top lines, `{array}` vertical lines, `\hline`, `\hdashline`, `\underline`, `\overline`, and the borders of `\fbox`, `\boxed`, and `\fcolorbox`.
ast.target: 指定分数线、`\\sqrt` 顶线、`{array}` 垂直线、`\\hline`、`\\hdashline`、`\\underline`、`\\overline` 以及 `\\fbox`、`\\boxed` 和 `\\fcolorbox` 边框的最小厚度（以 em 为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的 2 参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，则会抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If non-zero, all user-specified sizes, e.g. in \rule{500em}{500em}, will be capped to maxSize ems. Otherwise, elements and spaces can be arbitrarily large
ast.target: 如果非零，所有用户指定的尺寸（例如在 \\rule{500em}{500em} 中）将被限制为最大 maxSize em。否则，元素和空间可以任意大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定次数，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Field groups to include when freezing edges.
ast.target: 冻结边时要包含的字段组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select the sorting method for the edges in the graph.
ast.target: 选择图中边的排序方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select the edge attributes to show.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use defined edge fields, then reorder with arrows or drag-and-drop.
ast.target: 使用已定义的边字段，然后使用箭头或拖放重新排序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select the field groups to show in the left side of this view
ast.target: 选择要在此视图左侧显示的字段组

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select the field groups to show in the right side of this view
ast.target: 选择要在此视图右侧显示的字段组

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which edge-type groups to follow when walking up to the root. Typically 'ups'.
ast.target: 向上遍历到根节点时要遵循的边类型组。通常是 'ups'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which edge-type groups this view follows. Include downs so the tree can traverse down (parent → child), including Dendron hubs to their children. With only ups, only up (child → parent) edges are used.
ast.target: 此视图遵循的边类型组。包含 downs 以便树可以向下遍历（父级 → 子级），包括 Dendron 中心到其子节点。仅包含 ups 时，仅使用向上（子级 → 父级）边。

ast.name: message
ast.source: dataview-notes are not implemented without Dataview enabled
ast.target: 未启用 Dataview 时无法实现 dataview-notes

ast.name: message
ast.source: Tried to pop an empty stack

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 同一行上的意外 block-seq-ind 与键

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid codeblock YAML. Check the console for more information (press `Ctrl + Shift + I` to open the console).
ast.target: 无效的代码块 YAML。请检查控制台获取更多信息（按 `Ctrl + Shift + I` 打开控制台）。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 显示/复制图谱统计信息

ast.name: name
ast.source: Freeze implied edges to all notes in vault
ast.target: 将隐含边冻结到保险库中的所有笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure date note edge sources and transitive hierarchy rules.
ast.target: 配置日期笔记边缘源和传递性层次结构规则。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Jump to group. Right click to remove.
ast.target: 跳转到分组。右键点击可移除。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Jump to field. Right click for more actions.
ast.target: 跳转到字段。右键点击查看更多操作。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 右键点击查看更多操作。
